task: Generate 5 novel product ideas that help reduce food waste at home.
final_output:
Here are 5 novel product ideas to help reduce food waste at home:

1. Smart Refrigerator Shelf Liner with Integrated Freshness Tracking
- Features a color-changing sensor material that indicates food freshness
- Embedded NFC/RFID tags log purchase and expiration dates
- Smartphone app alerts users about items nearing expiration
- Suggests recipes using soon-to-expire ingredients
- Helps consumers optimize food consumption and reduce spoilage

2. Modular Vacuum Food Storage System
- Stackable, transparent containers with precision vacuum sealing
- Built-in portion measurement markings
- Compartmentalized design allows separating different food types
- Automatic moisture and oxygen removal extends food preservation
- Color-coded lids for easy organization and tracking

3. AI-Powered Meal Planning and Inventory Management Device
- Countertop device with built-in camera and AI recognition
- Scans current refrigerator/pantry contents
- Generates personalized meal plans using available ingredients
- Recommends optimal usage sequence to minimize waste
- Connects to grocery delivery services for efficient restocking

4. Compostable Food Preservation Wrap with Antimicrobial Properties
- Biodegradable wrap infused with natural preservation compounds
- Extends produce freshness without plastic waste
- Embedded sensors indicate food degradation
- Can be composted after use
- Reduces plastic packaging and food spoilage

5. Community Food Sharing and Redistribution Mobile App
- Platform connecting neighbors to share excess food
- Allows users to list surplus ingredients/meals
- Integrated safety verification and rating system
- Supports local food redistribution
- Reduces individual household food waste through community sharing

These innovative solutions address food waste through technology, design, and community collaboration.
